startPoint.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny in the Blooming Burrow.
startPoint.es: Habla con Easter Bunny en Blooming Burrow.

rewards.name: Easter event
rewards.display: Emotes from previous Easter events (if not already unlocked)

rewards.name: Blooming Burrow
rewards.display: Access to the Intel Eggstraction activity in the Blooming Burrow

text.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny outside their house in the Blooming Burrow.
text.es: Habla con Easter Bunny fuera de su casa en Blooming Burrow.

chatOptions: 1 Do you have a quest for me?

text.en: Go to the Egg Plant on the western side of the burrow and talk to either the Easter Bunny, Angus Almond, Carmilla Caramel, or Chad Berry.
text.es: Ve a Egg Plant, en el lado oeste de la madriguera, y habla con Easter Bunny, Angus Almond, Carmilla Caramel o Chad Berry.

text.en: Talk to the Easter Bunny just north.
text.es: Habla con Easter Bunny justo al norte.

text.en: Just outside of the Egg Plant, north-east of Nougat Bunny's stall, confront the Suspicious Rabbit.
text.es: Justo fuera de Egg Plant, al noreste del puesto de Nougat Bunny, enfréntate al Suspicious Rabbit.

text.en: Go east by passing the two bridges and then midway south (north of the Thieving icons on the map) and confront the Loitering Hare.
text.es: Ve hacia el este cruzando los dos puentes y luego hacia el sur, a mitad de camino (al norte de los iconos de Robo en el mapa), y enfréntate al Loitering Hare.

text.en: Go all the way south-east and confront the Odd Jackrabbit from behind.
text.es: Ve todo el camino hacia el sureste y enfréntate al Odd Jackrabbit por la espalda.

text.en: Talk to Count Rivance outside of Gerrant's Fishy Business at the eastern wall.
text.es: Habla con Count Rivance fuera de Gerrant's Fishy Business, junto al muro este.

text.en: Talk to either Angus Almond, Carmilla Caramel, or Chad Berry.
text.es: Habla con Angus Almond, Carmilla Caramel o Chad Berry.

chatOptions: 1 Carmilla has been replacing your gold with chocolate coins!
